narrative:
Fearing (precinct in Washington County) has 619 registered voters, with 48.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.7 percentage points.
